name: Capital Source Finance Llc
description_short: Capital Source Financial offers wealth solutions and financing for businesses. Based in Philadelphia, they serve existing clients and prospective business partners.
description_long: Capital Source Finance LLC is a Philadelphia-based financial services company operating under the business-loans category. The company maintains a physical office at 401 N Broad St, Philadelphia, PA 19108, and provides contact channels via phone (+1 215-261-5690) and email (info@capsurcefinancial.com). Their website indicates they have been operational at least through 2025. The company positions itself as a wealth solutions provider targeting business clients rather than individual consumers. Capital Source Financial offers unspecified wealth solutions designed for business owners and entrepreneurs seeking financing or financial management services. The website emphasizes serving existing clients with ongoing support while also attracting new business clients. Their marketing language suggests a focus on business-oriented financial products, though specific product details, loan amounts, terms, or APRs are not disclosed on their contact page. The company distinguishes itself through a personalized approach, inviting prospective clients to connect directly rather than relying solely on automated online applications. They also recruit talent, suggesting they operate with an established team structure. A significant limitation is that their "About Us" page returns a 404 error, preventing verification of company history, licensing information, specific credentials, or detailed product offerings. The lack of accessible information about their actual services, loan products, rates, or terms makes independent verification difficult. The company's web presence appears minimal, with the contact page providing only basic information and no detailed service descriptions, application process details, or customer testimonials available online.
pros: Local Philadelphia business with verifiable physical address at 401 N Broad St
Multiple contact methods available: phone, email, and physical office location
Serves both existing clients and new business prospects
Appears to offer personalized service rather than purely automated lending
Team-based operation suggests established business infrastructure
cons: About Us page returns 404 error—critical company information unavailable
No specific details on loan products, amounts, terms, rates, or APRs disclosed
No information on licensing, certifications, or regulatory oversight visible
Minimal web presence makes it difficult to verify company legitimacy or track record
No customer reviews, testimonials, or case studies available online
best_for: Existing Capital Source Financial clients seeking support or additional services
Philadelphia-area business owners who prefer in-person financial consultations
diagnosis: Capital Source Finance LLC appears to be a legitimate Philadelphia-based business lender, but prospective clients should proceed with caution due to the inaccessible About Us page and lack of publicly available product details, rates, or regulatory information. Verification of credentials and specific loan terms directly with the company is essential before proceeding.
